LanguageData.FFF.Modification_NoValidPart: no body part to attach modification
LanguageData.FFF.Message.AddonBroken: A modification durability on one of your mechs has exhausted
LanguageData.FFF.PlatingTooltip: Disposable ceramic armor protects the mecha from damage as ablative armor until its durability is exhausted and needs replacement.
LanguageData.FFF.Mod.CannotUseDueToNotSupport: This weapon mod cannot be applied here
LanguageData.FFF.Mod.NotModifiable: This weapon does not support modifications
LanguageData.FFF.Mod.NotValidForThisWeapon: This modification is not valid for this weapon
